event: intrauterine fetal demise of two co-triplets
delivered by emergency cesarean delivery at 31 weeks of pregnancy
admitted to the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit
CPAP with PEEP 6 and 30% FIO2 started
minor respiratory acidosis on blood gas
nasogastric tube feeding provided around half of nutritional requirements
genetic studies for neonatal cholestasis initiated
hepatobiliary scintigraphy test difficult due to recurrent apnea
serum amino acids: non-specific elevation of multiple amino acids
family genetic counseling appointment not documented
